name: agent-index-core
description: Core infrastructure for the agent-index system. v3.6.0: bug-cleanup release — apply-updates Phase 4 file-content sync (rewrites local .md/setup/manifest files during collection-update; closes bugs 20260502-8d20ea22-5 and 20260507-8d20ea22, with granular per-collection manifest_sync tracking in member-index.json); apply-updates Phase 1 step 5 extended to also strip the misplaced `exec` block from org-config.json (alongside the existing mcp_server strip); publish-updates 3.3.0 — Step 0 source-tree skip-list applied symmetrically across upload AND delete decisions plus new ephemeral-file patterns; workspace-marker-vs-collection-template Phase 2 — legacy collection-template file retired and apply-updates fallback removed; create-org template + org-config-schema.json no longer emit the duplicate exec block; gdrive credentials inline-vs-split rationale documented in schema and authoring guide. v3.5.0: publish-updates 3.2.0 with `--check-upstream` and smart prerequisite detection. v3.4.0: native Go permission-helper binary v0.2.0 + binary-distribution registry. v3.3.x: permission-change-helper skill + invite-member rewrite. v3.2.0: org-setup management dashboard. v3.1.x: extended adapter contract v2.0. v3.0.x: natural language triggers.
author: agent-index
